ocr_findings.description: Image shows ruby annotation 'アイピー' above 'IPアドレス'; OCR renders the term without ruby — standard omission for inline phonetic aids, no content impact.

reviewer_notes: Page is a Lesson 14-04 opener with a large illustrative image and body text on internet/IP address concepts. All text faithfully captured including IP address examples '13.112.248.159' and '192.168.1.1'. No meaningful content loss.
